metadata.description: BMS Session API tools for HOSxP hospital databases in Thailand

plugins.name: bms-session-plugin
plugins.description: BMS Session API integration — /api/sql + /api/rest (110 tables, CRUD, auto-joins) + MCP server auto-configuration

plugins.name: bms-speckit
plugins.description: 12-step chain-orchestrated dev pipeline with research (WebSearch + context7), rolling QC, and comprehensive final quality gate including live SQL schema validation: brainstorm → research → constitution → specify → plan → tasks → analyze → implement → QC (security/deps/UX/a11y/deploy/DB compatibility/SQL field validation) → merge.
